since_last: 36% of 86 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +0.56%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 36% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +1.08% · BTC +1.34% · Gold +0.11% · Nasdaq100 +2.48%. 36% of 86 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +0.56%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +0.56%; weakest is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at -0.71%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: ROK is the standout at +4.72%
cards.body: Leaders: ROK +4.72%, INTC +3.74%, MU +3.48%, SMCI +2.96%, VRT +2.17%. Laggards: SPCX -4.70%, SAP -3.16%, DV -2.23%, GOOGL -1.74%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -4.70% at $176.31
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -4.70% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
